title: nf-core/variantpipeline pipeline - params.input schema
description: Schema for the file provided with params.input

sample.errorMessage: Sample name must be provided and cannot contain spaces

fastq.errorMessage: FastQ file for long-reads must be provided, cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.fq.gz' or '.fastq.gz'

bam.errorMessage: BAM file cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.bam'

bai.errorMessage: BAM index file cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.bai'

vcf.errorMessage: VCF file cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.vcf' or '.vcf.gz'

tbi.errorMessage: TBI index file cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.tbi'

bed.errorMessage: BED file cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.bed'

pod5.errorMessage: POD5 file cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.pod5'

haplotagged_bam.errorMessage: Haplotagged BAM file cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.bam'

haplotagged_bai.errorMessage: Haplotagged BAI index file cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.bai'

bam_h1.errorMessage: H1 BAM file cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.bam'

bai_h1.errorMessage: H1 BAI index file cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.bai'

bam_h2.errorMessage: H2 BAM file cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.bam'

bai_h2.errorMessage: H2 BAI index file cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.bai'
